title: 3 practical steps to ensure the US industrial boom runs on electricity
snippet: Long-term electricity procurement, on-site generation, efficiency and flexibility can give manufacturers more ways to manage their energy bills, writes the World Wildlife Fund’s Cihang Yuan.
ai_summary: Article discusses US industrial electrification and long-term electricity procurement strategies. Relevant as background on I&C customer procurement trends and the shift to renewable electricity, though focused on US market rather than UK.
ai_reasoning: Covers I&C electricity procurement and on-site generation strategies relevant to tem's sector, but is US-focused and lacks UK specificity or direct competitive/regulatory impact. Worth reading for industry context.
